surface_verification.justification: Internal compliance-artifact generators (test-evidence.md + traceability-matrix.md) plus one optional event-format field; no startable user-facing web/UI surface. Verified by the compliance suite (894), cross-plugin contract + enforcement (15), and a real-data render probe against the live event log (71 commit links, 40 FR links, descending timeline, summary fallback).

behaviors.behavior: AC-1 Test Progression Source links canonical iterate event cross-file to its Verification Timeline row; non-canonical stays plain
AC-2 Requirements Coverage (iter) token links to the latest-tested event timeline anchor; build stays plain
AC-3 each coverage row carries an in-document rtm-fr anchor placed after the requirement link
AC-4 Verification Timeline sorted descending (newest first); malformed timestamps sort last
AC-5 timeline FRs link declared FRs to their coverage-row anchor; unknown FRs stay plain
AC-6 commit links to host diff when repo url resolvable; empty commit / no url stays plain; git remote https+ssh resolution
AC-7 Event label prefers authored summary, else cleaned description (strips iterate: prefix), else id; from_dict round-trip
AC-8 F5b reference documents authoring the summary field
AC-9 synthesized Full Suite Runs carries the honest unit-only note; real test_run path has none
